Sword of Aspiration.description: BASIC ATTACK: An attack with up to 4 sequences that deals Physical DMG. As the controlled operator, Final Strike also deals 17 Stagger. DIVE ATTACK: Basic attack performed in mid-air becomes a dive attack that deals Physical DMG to nearby enemies. FINISHER: Basic attack performed near a Staggered enemy becomes a finisher attack that deals massive Physical DMG and recovers some SP.

Burst of Passion.description: A frontal slash that deals Heat DMG and applies Heat Infliction.

Flash and Dash.description: Performs a returning dash with 2 thrust sequences, with each sequence dealing Physical DMG and recovering some SP. Trigger: When an enemy becomes Staggered or hits a Stagger Node.

SQUAD! ON ME!.description: Enters a channeling state and fires 3 Rallying Flares. Each firing recovers some SP.

talents.name: Coffee or Tea
talents.description: Assign to Manufacturing Cabin to slow Mood Drop of all operators in it by 10/14%.

talents.name: Icebreaker
talents.description: Assign to Reception Room to slow Mood Drop of all operators in it by 10/14%.

talents.name: Cheer of Victory
talents.description: Combo skill Flash and Dash improved: For every 10 points of Intellect, SP Recovery +1/1.5% (max: 50/75%).

talents.name: Staying in the Zone
talents.description: Ultimate SQUAD! ON ME! improved: When ultimate is active, gains Link.

Basic Rod Casting.description: BASIC ATTACK: An attack with up to 5 sequences that deals Physical DMG. As the controlled operator, Final Strike also deals 17 Stagger. DIVE ATTACK: Basic attack performed in mid-air becomes a dive attack that deals Physical DMG to nearby enemies. FINISHER: Basic attack performed near a Staggered enemy becomes a finisher attack that deals massive Physical DMG and recovers some SP.

Unconventional Lure.description: Hooks a block of ice and slams it to deal Physical DMG to the enemy target. When hitting a target with Cryo Infliction, Alesh consumes all of the target's Cryo Infliction stacks, forcibly applies Solidification to the target, and recovers some SP based on the number of stacks consumed. The SP recovery effect can only trigger 1 time, even if the skill hits multiple enemies.

Auger Angling.description: Opens an angling hole beneath the enemy that deals Physical DMG and recovers some SP. The skill has a chance to hook a Rare Fin that greatly increases the DMG dealt and recovers some more SP. Trigger: When the Arts Reaction or Originium Crystals of a nearby target is consumed.

One Monster Catch!.description: Alesh hooks a fin of unbelievable size and slams it to deal Cryo DMG and apply Cryo Infliction to enemies in a large area of effect in front of him. He recovers some SP on hit, with additional SP gained for each target defeated.

talents.name: Casual Angling
talents.description: Assign to Control Nexus to grant all operators’ Mood Regen +8/12%.

talents.name: Anglers' Intel Network
talents.description: Assign to Reception Room to grant operators a small Clue 1/Clue 1 Rate-UP: UWST (activates upon assignment; effects of the same type cannot stack)

talents.name: Flash-frozen for Freshness
talents.description: After Solidification or Originium Crystals are applied to a nearby enemy, Alesh gains 3/4 Ultimate Energy. If the Solidification is applied by Alesh, double the amount of Ultimate Energy gained. Effect can only trigger once every 3s.

talents.name: Veteran Angler
talents.description: Combo skill Auger Angling improved: Every 10 Intellect grants Rare Fin catching chance +0.2/0.5% (max: +30%).

Exchange Current.description: BASIC ATTACK: An attack with up to 4 sequences that deals Electric DMG. As the controlled operator, Final Strike also deals 15 Stagger. DIVE ATTACK: Basic attack performed in mid-air becomes a dive attack that deals Electric DMG to nearby enemies. FINISHER: Basic attack performed near a Staggered enemy becomes a finisher attack that deals massive Electric DMG and recovers some SP.

Specified Research Subject.description: Applies Focus with a long duration on the enemy and deals Electric DMG. An enemy with an active Focus also suffers Electric Susceptibility and Heat Susceptibility. Focus can only be applied to 1 enemy at any given time.

EMP Test Site.description: Triggers 1 energy explosion on the enemy that deals Electric DMG and applies another stack of the same Physical Status or Arts Infliction. Trigger: When an enemy with active Focus suffers a Physical Status or Arts Infliction.

Overclocked Moment.description: Applies temporary Electric Amp and Heat Amp to the entire team.

talents.name: Experimental Arts Unit
talents.description: Assign to Manufacturing Cabin to grant weapon EXP material production efficiency +10/20%.

talents.name: Pun-isher Studies
talents.description: Assign to Growth Chamber to slow Mood Drop of all operators in it by 14/18%.

talents.name: Improviser
talents.description: After an Amped teammate deals Skill DMG, Antal restores the said teammate's HP by [72 + Strength×0.6]/[108 + Strength×0.9]. This HP restoring effect triggers 1 time every 30s for each operator.

talents.name: Subconscious Act
talents.description: Gains 30% chance of Physical DMG immunity and restores HP of self by [27 + Strength×0.23]/[45 + Strength×0.38].

Seek and Hunt.description: BASIC ATTACK: An attack with up to 5 sequences that deals Physical DMG. As the controlled operator, Final Strike also deals 16 Stagger. DIVE ATTACK: Basic attack performed in mid-air becomes a dive attack that deals Physical DMG to nearby enemies. FINISHER: Basic attack performed near a Staggered enemy becomes a finisher attack that deals massive Physical DMG and recovers some SP.

Tempestuous Arc.description: Instantly blinks to the enemy's side to deal 2 slashes that deal some Physical DMG. If the enemy has active Electrification, consume the Electrification to unleash an additional attack that deals Electric DMG and recovers some SP.

Peal of Thunder.description: Blinks to the enemy's side to unleash a flurry of slashes that deals Physical DMG and recovers some SP. Trigger: When an enemy suffers Electrification or after an enemy's Electrification is consumed.

Exploding Blitz.description: Performs a short forward dash while wreathed in arcs of electricity to deal Electric DMG and apply Electric Infliction to all enemies in the path. The lingering arcs explode after a short while, dealing another hit of Electric DMG. If the enemy has active Electric Infliction, consume the Electric Infliction and forcibly apply Electrification.

talents.name: Blade of the Wildlands
talents.description: Assign to Manufacturing Cabin to grant weapon EXP material production efficiency +10/20%.

talents.name: Hanna Traditions
talents.description: Assign to Reception Room to grant operators a small Clue 6/Clue 6 Rate-UP: Hannabit Circuit (activates upon assignment; effects of the same type cannot stack)

talents.name: Wildland Trekker
talents.description: Battle skill Tempestuous Arc improved: Triggering the additional effect 3 time(s) grants the team Electric DMG Dealt +0.05/0.08% for every point of Arclight's Intellect. This effect has a 15s duration and cannot stack.

talents.name: Hannabit Wisdom
talents.description: 30/50% chance to ignore an Arts Infliction applied on her.

Rocky Whispers.description: BASIC ATTACK: An attack with up to 4 sequences that deals Nature DMG. As the controlled operator, Final Strike also deals 18 Stagger. DIVE ATTACK: Basic attack performed in mid-air becomes a dive attack that deals Nature DMG to nearby enemies. FINISHER: Basic attack performed near a Staggered enemy becomes a finisher attack that deals massive Nature DMG and recovers some SP.

Dolly Rush.description: Hops on Mr. Dolly and rams the target to deal Nature DMG. If the target has Corrosion, then consume the Corrosion and apply Physical Susceptibility and Arts Susceptibility to the target.

Eruption Column.description: Launches a homing Volcanic Cloud at a target enemy that deals Nature DMG when close enough to the target. The Volcanic Cloud explodes after a short delay, dealing half of the Nature DMG and forcibly applying temporary Corrosion to nearby enemies. Trigger: When the controlled operator performs a Final Strike on an enemy with no stacks of Vulnerability or Arts Infliction.

Wooly Party.description: Ardelia enters a mobile channeling state and summons the aid of Mr. Dolly. Multiple copies of Mr. Dolly are thrown in random directions. Each copy deals Nature DMG. Each enemy can only take 1 damaging hit every 0.3s.

talents.name: Tales of the Land
talents.description: Assign to Reception Room to grant operator clue collecting efficiency +20/30%.

talents.name: Mr. Dolly's Game
talents.description: Assign to Reception Room to slow Mood Drop of all operators in it by 14/18%.

talents.name: Friendly Presence
talents.description: The battle skill Dolly Rush creates 3 Shadows of Mr. Dolly after hitting the enemy. The copies of Mr. Dolly scattered by the ultimate Wooly Party also has a 10% chance to create Shadows of Mr. Dolly when they fall to the ground. When the controlled operator touches a Shadow of Mr. Dolly, Ardelia restores the said operator's HP by [45 + Will×0.38]/[63 + Will×0.53]/[90 + Will×0.75]. If the controlled operator is already at max HP, then restore the HP of the teammate with lowest percentage HP. Shadows of Mr. Dolly lasts for 10s and up to 10 can exist in the battlefield.

talents.name: Mountainpeak Surfer
talents.description: Battle skill Dolly Rush improved: Triggering the additional effect while an enemy with Corrosion is nearby immediately casts the battle skill again. This effect only triggers once per active battle skill casting.

THunderlance: Blitz.description: BASIC ATTACK: An attack with up to 5 sequences that deals Physical DMG. As the controlled operator, Final Strike also deals 17 Stagger. DIVE ATTACK: Basic attack performed in mid-air becomes a dive attack that deals Physical DMG to nearby enemies. FINISHER: Basic attack performed near a Staggered enemy becomes a finisher attack that deals massive Physical DMG and recovers some SP.

Thunderlance: Interdiction.description: Leaps into mid-air to stir up a maelstrom with her lance, dealing some Electric DMG to nearby enemies while pulling back all Thunderlances and Thunderlance EX in the battlefield towards herself. The returning Thunderlances pierce through all enemies along their paths and deal Electric DMG, while returning Thunderlances EX deal more Electric DMG and also apply Electric Infliction.

Thunderlance: Strike.description: Leaps into mid-air and throws 3 Thunderlances at the target, then deals 1 hit of Electric DMG to enemies in the area of effect. Trigger: When controlled operator performs a Final Strike on a target with active Electric Infliction or Electrification.

Thunderlance: Final Shock.description: Throws a Thunderlance EX at the target area that deals massive Electric DMG to enemies nearby.

talents.name: Residence Advisor
talents.description: Assign to Control Nexus to grant all operators' Mood Regen +8/12%.

talents.name: Messenger's Secret
talents.description: Assign to Reception Room to grant operators a small Clue 2/Clue 2 Rate-UP: TGCC (activates upon assignment; effects of the same type cannot stack)

talents.name: Expedited Delivery
talents.description: After a thrown or returning Thunderlance or Thunderlance EX hits the enemy, Avywenna gains 3/4 Ultimate Energy.

talents.name: Tactful Approach
talents.description: Ultimate Thunderlance: Final Shock improved: Also applies 6/10% Electric Susceptibility for 10s to enemies it hits.

Basic Tactics.description: BASIC ATTACK: An attack with up to 4 sequences that deals Physical DMG. As the controlled operator, Final Strike also deals 22 Stagger. DIVE ATTACK: Basic attack performed in mid-air becomes a dive attack that deals Physical DMG to nearby enemies. FINISHER: Basic attack performed near a Staggered enemy becomes a finisher attack that deals massive Physical DMG and recovers some SP.

Rigid Interdiction.description: Raises a shield that can block attacks, grants Protection to self and nearby operators, and immediately returns some SP. When attacked while the said shield is active, perform a retaliation bash that deals Physical DMG and applies 1 stack of Vulnerability to the attacking enemy.

Timely Suppression.description: A powerful downward punch that deals Physical DMG to the enemy, while granting shields to self and another teammate (controlled operator prioritized). DEF can further increase Shield points. Trigger: When an enemy starts charging up a skill, or when the controlled operator is attacked and falls below 40% HP.

Textbook Assault.description: Swings the greatsword to perform 2 consecutive slashes to deal Physical DMG and apply Weaken, followed by a powerful downward slam that deals massive Physical DMG and applies Knock Down to all enemies within the area of effect.

talents.name: Silent Caretaker
talents.description: Assign to Control Nexus to grant all operators' Mood Regen +8/12%.

talents.name: Grounded Approach
talents.description: Assign to Growth Chamber to slow Mood Drop of all operators in it by 14/18%.

talents.name: Resilient Defense
talents.description: For every 10 Will, DEF +1/1.2.

talents.name: Comprehensive Mindset
talents.description: Ultimate Textbook Assault improved: Final hit creates 2/3 shockwave(s), each dealing 30/45% ATK of Physical DMG.

Soaring Break.description: BASIC ATTACK: An attack with up to 5 sequences that deals Physical DMG. As the controlled operator, Final Strike also deals 16 Stagger. DIVE ATTACK: Basic attack performed in mid-air becomes a dive attack that deals Physical DMG to nearby enemies. FINISHER: Basic attack performed near a Staggered enemy becomes a finisher attack that deals massive Physical DMG and recovers some SP.

Ascending Strike.description: Performs an uppercut slash at the target enemy, dealing Physical DMG and Lift.

Soar to the Stars.description: A slashing dash that passes through the target enemy and deals Physical DMG and Lift to all enemies along the way. Trigger: When an enemy becomes Vulnerable.

Blade Gale.description: A 7-sequence slash attack that deals Physical DMG with each sequence to the target enemy. The final slash sequence deals even more DMG.

talents.name: Blade Critique
talents.description: Assign to Manufacturing Cabin to grant weapon EXP material production efficiency +10/20%.

talents.name: Jadeworking
talents.description: Assign to Growth Chamber to grant rare mineral growth rate +20/30%.

talents.name: Slashing Edge
talents.description: After hitting an enemy with skills, Chen gains ATK +4/8% for 10s. This effect can reach 5 stacks.

talents.name: Momentum Breaker
talents.description: Interrupting the enemy's charge up deals another 5/10 Stagger.

ROLLING CUT!.description: BASIC ATTACK: An attack with up to 4 sequences that deals Physical DMG. As the controlled operator, Final Strike also deals 20 Stagger. DIVE ATTACK: Basic attack performed in mid-air becomes a dive attack that deals Physical DMG to nearby enemies. FINISHER: Basic attack performed near a Staggered enemy becomes a finisher attack that deals massive Physical DMG and recovers some SP.

FLIP DA WOK!.description: Takes out a wok, quickly charges it up, and performs a powerful wok flip that deals Physical DMG and Lift to the enemy.

MORE SPICE!.description: Swings the wok at the enemy to deal massive Physical DMG and Crush. This Crush also deals more DMG. Trigger: When an enemy reaches 4 stacks of Vulnerability.

CHOP 'N DUNK!.description: Da Pan slams the chopping board to forcibly Lift all enemies in the area of effect in front of him. This is followed by a 6-sequence flurry of slashes that deals Physical DMG. The final step is to bash every enemy to the ground to forcibly Knock Down and deal massive Physical DMG to them.

talents.name: Chef of Forage and Game
talents.description: Assign to Growth Chamber to grant fungal matter growth rate +10/20%.

talents.name: Worldly Wisdom
talents.description: Assign to Control Nexus to grant all operators' Mood Regen +12/16%.

talents.name: Reduce and Thicken
talents.description: After consuming 1 Vulnerability stack, Da Pan gains Physical DMG Dealt +4/6% for 10s. This effect can reach 4 stacks.

talents.name: Salty or Mild
talents.description: Ultimate CHOP 'N DUNK! improved: For every enemy hit by the final sequence of the ultimate, gains 1 stack of Prep Ingredients for 20s (max stacks: 1/2). When Prep Ingredients is active, hitting an enemy with combo skills immediately shortens cooldown by 40% and consumes 1 stack of Prep Ingredients.

Sword Art of Assault.description: BASIC ATTACK: An attack with up to 4 sequences that deals Physical DMG. As the controlled operator, Final Strike also deals 25 Stagger. DIVE ATTACK: Basic attack performed in mid-air becomes a dive attack that deals Physical DMG to nearby enemies. FINISHER: Basic attack performed near a Staggered enemy becomes a finisher that deals massive Physical DMG and recovers some SP.

Forward March.description: A leap followed by a heavy slam that deals Heat DMG, Knock Down and Stagger to all enemies in a fan-shaped area. If Ember takes DMG from enemies during casting, the slam deals more Stagger upon hit.

Frontline Support.description: Leaps at the target enemy and unleashes a heavy slam that deals Physical DMG and Knock Down while giving HP treatment to the controlled operator. The attribute of Will increases the amount of HP treatment. Trigger: When the controlled operator is attacked.

Re-Ignited Oath.description: Slams the ground to deal Heat DMG to nearby enemies, while granting every teammate a Shield based on Ember's Max HP.

talents.name: Special Northern Training
talents.description: Assign to Manufacturing Cabin to grant operator EXP material productivity efficiency +20/30%.

talents.name: Keepers of the Banner
talents.description: Assign to Reception Room to grant operators a small Clue 4/Clue 4 Rate-UP: Order of Steel Oath (activates upon assignment; effects of the same type cannot stack)

talents.name: Inflamed for the Assault
talents.description: When casting the battle skill Forward March and the combo skill Frontline Support, Ember gains of 30/50% Protection and is less likely to be interrupted.

talents.name: Pay the Ferric Price
talents.description: When Ember receives DMG from the enemy, she gains ATK +6/9% for 7s. This effect can reach 3 stacks.

Destructive Sequence.description: BASIC ATTACK: An attack with up to 5 sequences that deals Physical DMG. As the controlled operator, Final Strike also deals 18 Stagger. DIVE ATTACK: Basic attack performed in mid-air becomes a dive attack that deals Physical DMG to nearby enemies. FINISHER: Basic attack performed near a Staggered enemy becomes a finisher attack that deals massive Physical DMG and recovers some SP.

Constructive Sequence.description: A forceful burst of Originium Arts that attacks enemies within the area of effect. Deals Physical DMG and applies Crush.

Sealing Sequence.description: Rushes to the enemy's side to deal Physical DMG and attach Originium Crystals that temporarily seals them. Applying Physical Status or Vulnerability to the sealed enemy consumes the Originium Crystals and deal additional Physical DMG. Trigger: When another operator in the team deals DMG with combo skills.

Bombardment Sequence.description: Bombards the ground with Originium Arts, dealing massive Physical DMG to all enemies within a fan-shaped area. If the enemy has Originium Crystals on them, this skill consumes the Originium Crystals and deals 1 more hit of Physical DMG.

talents.name: Essence Disintegration
talents.description: When the Originium Crystals attached to the enemy is consumed, the Endministrator gains ATK +15/30% for 15s. This effect cannot stack.

talents.name: Realspace Stasis
talents.description: Enemies with attached Originium Crystals suffer Physical DMG Taken +20/30%.

Audio Noise.description: BASIC ATTACK: An attack with up to 4 sequences that deals Physical DMG. As the controlled operator, Final Strike also deals 17 Stagger. DIVE ATTACK: Basic attack performed in mid-air becomes a dive attack that deals Physical DMG to nearby enemies. FINISHER: Basic attack performed near a Staggered enemy becomes a finisher attack that deals massive Physical DMG and recovers some SP.

Onomatopoeia.description: A lance thrust that fires a stream of freezing sound waves that deal Cryo DMG and apply Cryo Infliction to all enemies along its straight path.

Distortion.description: Quickly moves to the enemy's side to deal Physical DMG and forcibly Lift enemies in a small area. If the skill hits a target with Solidification, the skill deals additional DMG and applies Physical Susceptibility. Trigger: When an enemy suffers Solidification.

Tremolo.description: Estella expends all her strength to unleash a powerful slam of the spear shaft, dealing Physical DMG to all enemies in a circular area around self. To enemies with Physical Susceptibility, the skill forcibly applies Lift to them.

talents.name: Fragmented Rest
talents.description: Assign to Control Nexus to grant all operators' Mood Regen +8/12%.

talents.name: Frequency Monitoring
talents.description: Assign to Reception Room to grant operator clue collecting efficiency +20/30%

talents.name: Commiseration
talents.description: When triggering Shatter, the next battle skill Onomatopoeia cast returns 7.5/15 SP. This effect cannot stack.

talents.name: Laziness Pays Off Now
talents.description: Ignores Cryo Infliction and receives Cryo DMG -10/20%.

Signature Gun Kata.description: BASIC ATTACK: An attack with up to 4 sequences that deals Nature DMG. As the controlled operator, Final Strike also deals 15 Stagger. DIVE ATTACK: Basic attack performed in mid-air becomes a dive attack that deals Nature DMG to nearby enemies. FINISHER: Basic attack performed near a Staggered enemy becomes a finisher attack that deals massive Nature DMG and recovers some SP.

Tiny Surprise.description: Kicks an Improvised Explosive that sticks to the target, applying Slow and exploding after a short duration. The explosion deals Nature DMG and Nature Infliction to enemies in the area of effect. Defeating the target also sets off the Improvised Explosive immediately. Only 1 Improvised Explosive can be present in the battlefield.

Free Giveaway.description: Shoots the target enemy to trigger a special explosion that deals Nature DMG and applies another Arts Infliction of the element already on the enemy. Trigger: When an enemy has 2 or more stacks of Cryo Infliction or Nature Infliction.

Apex Prankster.description: Fluorite quickly moves in an arc and rapidly fires at the target within the arc to deal 4 sequences of Nature DMG. If an Improvised Explosive has been stuck to the target, the skill detonates it immediately and increases the DMG and size of the explosion. If the final DMG sequence hits a target with at least 2 stacks of Cryo Infliction or Nature Infliction, then apply the same Arts Infliction again.

talents.name: Wildlands Trekker
talents.description: Assign to Growth Chamber to grant rare mineral growth rate +10/20%.

talents.name: Reader of Emotions
talents.description: Assign to Control Nexus to grant all operators' Mood Regen +12/16%.

talents.name: Love the Stab and Twist
talents.description: Fluorite gains DMG Dealt +10/20% against Slowed targets.

talents.name: Unpredictable
talents.description: Grants 20% chance of Arts DMG immunity and grants Fluorite ATK +10/20% for 10s. This effect cannot stack.

Arcane Staff: Beam Cohesion Arts.description: BASIC ATTACK: An attack with up to 4 sequences that deals Nature DMG. As the controlled operator, Final Strike also deals 16 Stagger. DIVE ATTACK: Basic attack performed in mid-air becomes a dive attack that deals Nature DMG to nearby enemies. FINISHER: Basic attack performed near a Staggered enemy becomes a finisher attack that deals massive Nature DMG and recovers some SP.

Arcane Staff: Gravity Mode.description: Initiates Arts channeling that creates a gravity well. The gravity well pulls in nearby enemies and deals Nature DMG to them. When channeling ends, the gravity well implodes to deal Nature DMG and Nature Infliction to enemies in the area of effect.

Arcane Staff: Matrix Displacement.description: A quick casting of the Arts that generates a gravity pull, which then deals Nature DMG and forcibly Lifts the target and nearby enemies. Trigger: When an Arts Reaction is applied to an enemy.

Arcane Staff: Gravity Field.description: Creates an Anomalous Gravity Field that instantly deals 1 hit of Nature DMG and applies Nature Infliction to enemies caught in the field. Targets in the Anomalous Gravity Field also suffer from Slow and Arts Susceptibility. The effect of Arts Susceptibility is further increased based on the number of active Vulnerability stacks on the target. If a target in the field is Lifted, the Lifted status will persist until the field wears off.

talents.name: Messengerial Processing
talents.description: Assign to Manufacturing Cabin to slow Mood Drop of all operators in it by 14/18%.

talents.name: Messengerial Arms Mastery
talents.description: Assign to Manufacturing Cabin to grant weapon EXP material production efficiency 20/30%.

talents.name: Messenger’s Song
talents.description: When fighting in the battlefield, all allied guards, casters, and supporters gain Ultimate Gain Efficiency +4/7%.

talents.name: Late Reply
talents.description: Battle skill Arcane Staff: Gravity Mode and combo skill Arcane Staff: Matrix Displacement improved: Hitting at least 2 enemies with either the combo skill or the last sequence of the battle skill restores [72 + Intellect×0.60]/[108 + Intellect×0.90] HP to the controlled operator. If the controlled operator is already at max HP, then restore the HP of the teammate with the lowest percentage HP.

Flaming Cinders.description: BASIC ATTACK: An attack with up to 5 sequences that deals Heat DMG. As the controlled operator, Final Strike also deals 18 Stagger. DIVE ATTACK: Basic attack performed in mid-air becomes a dive attack that deals Heat DMG to nearby enemies. FINISHER: Basic attack performed near a Staggered enemy becomes a finisher attack that deals massive Heat DMG and recovers some SP.

Smouldering Fire.description: Summons a Magma Fragment to continuously attack enemies and deal Heat DMG. Hitting the enemy grants 1 stack of Melting Flame. If Laevatain already has 4 stack(s) of Melting Flame when casting the skill, then consume all the stacks and perform 1 additional attack that deals Heat DMG and forcibly trigger temporary Combustion to all enemies in a large area. When the additional attack hits the enemy, restore additional Ultimate Energy. Battle skill effects are enhanced while Laevatain's ultimate is active.

Seethe.description: Fire erupts beneath the feet of any enemy with Combustion or Corrosion, dealing Heat DMG to them. If the skill hits the enemy, Laevatain gains 1 stack of Melting Flame and further gains Ultimate Energy per enemy hit. Trigger: When an enemy suffers Combustion or Corrosion.

Twilight.description: Laevatain summons her Sviga Lævi and becomes the controlled operator. For a certain duration, her basic attacks (BATK) are enhanced and the Sviga Lævi strikes together with Laevatain, with each attack dealing Heat DMG. BATK sequence 3 also applies Heat Infliction.

talents.name: Memory Crucible
talents.description: Assign to Manufacturing Cabin to grant operator EXP material production efficiency +20/30%.

talents.name: Undying Flames
talents.description: Assign to Manufacturing Cabin to slow Mood Drop of all operators in it by 14/18%.

talents.name: Scorching Heart
talents.description: When the controlled operator's Final Strike or Finisher hits the enemy, Laevatain absorbs Heat Infliction from nearby enemies. Every stack of Heat Infliction absorbed gives Laevatain 1 stack of Melting Flame (max stacks: 4). At 4 stacks, DMG dealt by Laevatain ignores 10/15/20 Heat Resistance of the enemy for 20s. Laevatain also absorbs Heat Infliction from enemies defeated nearby.

talents.name: Re-Ignition
talents.description: When HP drops below 40%, gain 90% Protection and restore 5% Max HP per second for 4/8s. This effect triggers once every 120s.

Dance of Rime.description: BASIC ATTACK: An attack with up to 4 sequences that deals Cryo DMG. As the controlled operator, Final Strike also deals 25 Stagger. DIVE ATTACK: Basic attack performed in mid-air becomes a dive attack that deals Cryo DMG to nearby enemies. FINISHER: Basic attack performed near a Staggered enemy becomes a finisher attack that deals massive Cryo DMG and recovers some SP.

Esoteric Legacy of Seš'qa.description: Performs a Hypothermic Perfusion on the controlled operator's weapon and returns some SP. The next Final Strike performed by the currently controlled operator within a certain duration creates Last Rite's Mirage that unleashes a pursuit attack at the target. This attack deals Cryo DMG and applies Cryo Infliction. When the controlled operator is Last Rite herself, casting this battle skill does not reset her basic attack sequence.

Winter's Devourer.description: Encases the target enemy in icicles and shatters them to consume all Cryo Infliction stacks of the said enemy. The number of Cryo Infliction stacks consumed determines the amount of Cryo DMG dealt to the enemy and Ultimate Energy gained by the caster. Trigger: When an enemy has 3 or more Cryo Infliction stacks.

Vigil Services.description: Last Rite encases herself in frost armor and creates an ice scythe to perform 3 slashes, and gains immunity to all damages while this state is active. Each slash deals massive Cryo DMG. Last Rite can only gain Ultimate Energy from her own battle skill and combo skill.

talents.name: Cemetery Gardening
talents.description: Assign to Growth Chamber to grant vitrified plant growth rate +20/30%.

talents.name: Fame of the Royal Courts
talents.description: Assign to Reception Room to grant operators a small Clue 7/Clue 7 Rate-UP: Seš'qa (activates upon assignment; effects of the same type cannot stack)

talents.name: Hypothermia
talents.description: When Last Rite consumes any Arts Infliction, apply Cryo Susceptibility to the target with the effect of [Number of Arts Infliction stacks consumed × 2/4%] for 15s. This effect cannot stack.

talents.name: Cryogenic Embrittlement
talents.description: Ultimate Vigil Services improved: When the ultimate deals DMG to an enemy with Cryo Susceptibility, the effect of that Cryo Susceptibility is 1.2/1.5 times the original.

Ruination.description: BASIC ATTACK: An attack with up to 4 sequences that deals Physical DMG. As the controlled operator, Final Strike also deals 19 Stagger. DIVE ATTACK: Basic attack performed in mid-air becomes a dive attack that deals Physical DMG to nearby enemies. FINISHER: Basic attack performed near a Staggered enemy becomes a finisher that deals massive Physical DMG and recovers some SP.

Turbid Avatar.description: Swings the polearm multiple times to deal 2 hits of Physical DMG, then slams the ground to deal Physical DMG and Knock Down to all enemies in the area of effect. If the enemy struck by the last hit of this skill has no Vulnerability stacks, apply Physical Susceptibility to the said enemy instead.

Aspect of Wrath.description: Unleashes an aspect that performs a spear thrust to deal Physical DMG and grants Link. Trigger: When the controlled operator performs a Final Strike on an enemy with Physical Susceptibility or Breach.

Heart of the Unmoving.description: Unleashes an aspect that slams an Immovable Vajra to deal Physical DMG and Knock Down to all enemies in a large area of effect, then enemies are drawn toward the center of the area. After a while, enemies still within the vajra slam area of effect will suffer another massive Physical DMG and Knock Down. If the skill consumes a Link, it deals additional massive Physical DMG.

talents.name: Youthful Ambition
talents.description: Assign to Control Nexus to grant all operators' Mood Regen +12/16%.

talents.name: Laddie Reliable
talents.description: Assign to Reception Room to grant operators a small Clue 3/Clue 3 Rate-UP: HAS (activates upon assignment; effects of the same type cannot stack)

talents.name: Illumination
talents.description: Every point of Intellect and Will further grants ATK +0.10/0.15%.

talents.name: Subduer of Evil
talents.description: Applying Knock Down also deals 50/100% ATK of Physical DMG.

Protocol α: Breach.description: BASIC ATTACK: An attack with up to 4 sequences that deals Electric DMG. As the controlled operator, Final Strike also deals 15 Stagger. DIVE ATTACK: Basic attack performed in mid-air becomes a dive attack that deals Electric DMG to nearby enemies. FINISHER: Basic attack performed near a Staggered enemy becomes a finisher attack that deals massive Electric DMG and recovers some SP.

Protocol ω: Strike.description: Unleashes a bolt of electro-magnetic energy that deals Electric DMG and Electric Infliction to enemies in a small area.

Instant Protocol: Chain.description: Unleashes stored electro-magnetic energy to bombard the target, dealing Electric DMG and forcibly inflicting temporary Electrification. Trigger: When controlled operator performs a Final Strike on any enemy.

Protocol ε: 70.41K.description: Tele-protocols a massive piece of orbital debris into the battlefield with devastating impact. All enemies in the area of effect suffer massive Electric DMG.

talents.name: Supervisor
talents.description: Assign to Control Nexus to grant all operators' Mood Regen +8/12%.

talents.name: Protocol Redistribution
talents.description: Assign to Manufacturing Cabin to grant weapon EXP material production efficiency +20/30%.

talents.name: Obliteration Protocol
talents.description: DMG Dealt +20/30% to Staggered enemies.

talents.name: Cycle Protocol
talents.description: Combo skill Instant Protocol: Chain improved: When hitting a Vulnerable enemy, the hit chains 1 more time.

All-Out Offensive.description: BASIC ATTACK: An attack with up to 5 sequences that deals Physical DMG. As the controlled operator, Final Strike also deals 18 Stagger. DIVE ATTACK: Basic attack performed in mid-air becomes a dive attack that deals Physical DMG to nearby enemies. FINISHER: Basic attack performed near a Staggered enemy becomes a finisher attack that deals massive Physical DMG and recovers some SP.

The Pulverizing Front.description: Pogranichnik performs 2 slashes at enemies in front of him, dealing Physical DMG, applying Breach, and recovering SP based on the number of Vulnerability stacks consumed. The SP recovery effect can only trigger 1 time, even if the skill hits multiple targets.

Full Moon Slash.description: Performs a number of slashes (up to 3) based on the max number of Vulnerability stacks consumed, dealing Physical DMG and recovering some SP. Each slash deals more DMG and gives better SP recovery. Consuming 4 stacks of Vulnerability enhances the 3rd slash. Trigger: When Crush or Breach consumes the enemy's Vulnerability stack(s).

Shieldguard Banner, Forward.description: Summons 4 Shieldguards to advance and push all enemies along the way towards the target, dealing Physical DMG while generating 5 points of Steel Oath. After an enemy suffers a Physical Status or takes DMG from Pogranichnik's combo skill, consume 1 point of Steel Oath and summon 1 Shieldguard to harass the said enemy, dealing Physical DMG and recovering some SP. When the last Steel Oath point is consumed, all 4 Shieldguards will initiate a Decisive Assault that deals massive Physical DMG to the target while recovering plenty of SP.

talents.name: Hone the Weapons
talents.description: Assign to Manufacturing Cabin to grant weapon EXP material production efficiency +20/30%.

talents.name: Morale Boost
talents.description: Assign to Manufacturing Cabin to slow Mood Drop of all operators in it by 14/18%.

talents.name: The Living Banner
talents.description: During battle, recovering 80 SP with his own skills grants Fervent Morale for 20s. Fervent Morale effects: ATK +4/8% and Arts Intensity +4/8. This effect can reach 3 stacks. Duration of each stack is counted separately.

talents.name: Tactical Instruction
talents.description: Ultimate Shieldguard Banner, Forward improved: Any operator triggering the ultimate's subsequent effects also gains Fervent Morale for 5/10s. Requires activation of talent: The Living Banner.

Hypothermic Assault.description: BASIC ATTACK: An attack with up to 3 sequences that deals Physical DMG. As the controlled operator, Final Strike also deals 23 Stagger. DIVE ATTACK: Basic attack performed in mid-air becomes a dive attack that deals Physical DMG to nearby enemies. FINISHER: Basic attack performed near a Staggered enemy becomes a finisher attack that deals massive Physical DMG and recovers some SP.

Saturated Defense.description: Raises a shield that can block attacks, grants Protection to self and nearby operators, and immediately returns some SP. When attacked while the said shield is active, perform a retaliation bash that deals Cryo DMG and applies Cryo Infliction on the attacker.

Polar Rescue.description: Snowshine throws a Snowfield SAR Assistant at the controlled operator. Upon target contact, the Assistant gives massive instant HP Treatment to nearby operators as well as continuous HP Treatment to operators in the area of effect. The attribute of Will increases the amount of HP treatment. Trigger: When controlled operator gets attacked and is below 60% HP.

Frigid Snowfield.description: Leaps into mid-air with a jetpack before slamming down with her shield to deal massive Cryo DMG to enemies in the area of effect. Also generates a Snow Zone (lasting several seconds) that deals Cryo DMG over time to enemies. The Snow Zone forcibly applies Solidification to enemies caught within it for a certain duration.

talents.name: Rescuer's Perseverance
talents.description: Assign to Manufacturing Cabin to slow Mood Drop of all operators in it by 10/14%.

talents.name: Happy-Go-Lucky
talents.description: Assign to Control Nexus to grant all operators' Mood Regen +12/16%.

talents.name: Polar Survival
talents.description: Treatment Effect +15/25% for targets of 45/55% HP or below.

talents.name: SAR Professional
talents.description: Battle skill Saturated Defense improved: Successful retaliating an enemy attack gives another 6/10 Ultimate Energy.

Rapid Fire Akimbo.description: BASIC ATTACK: An attack with up to 4 sequences that deals Heat DMG. As the controlled operator, Final Strike also deals 18 Stagger. DIVE ATTACK: Basic attack performed in mid-air becomes a dive attack that deals Heat DMG to nearby enemies. FINISHER: Basic attack performed near a Staggered enemy becomes a finisher attack that deals massive Heat DMG and recovers some SP.

Thermite Tracers.description: Fires multiple shots at the target that deal some Heat DMG. The final shot also applies Heat Infliction. If the target has active Combustion or Electrification, do not apply Heat Infliction but instead consume the Arts Reaction to fire an additional shot that deals massive Heat DMG.

Frag Grenade·β.description: Throws a frag grenade at the target's location that explodes upon hitting the ground, dealing Heat DMG and Heat Infliction to nearby enemies. Trigger: When an Arts Infliction is applied to an enemy

Wolven Fury.description: Fire a rapid barrage of shots and unleashes the Wolven Fury to attack nearby enemies, dealing 5 hits of Heat DMG and forcibly applying Combustion.

talents.name: Pack Techniques
talents.description: Assign to Manufacturing Cabin to grant operator EXP material production efficiency +10/20%.

talents.name: Knack for the Wildlands
talents.description: Assign to Growth Chamber to grant rare mineral growth rate +20/30%.

talents.name: Scorching Fangs
talents.description: Whenever Wulfgard applies Combustion, he gains Scorching Fangs for 10s. This effect cannot stack. Scorching Fangs: While active, Wulfgard gains Heat DMG Dealt +20/30%.

talents.name: Code of Restraint
talents.description: Whenever the battle skill Thermite Tracers successfully consumes an Arts Reaction, return 5/10 SP.

Cooldown.description: BASIC ATTACK: An attack with up to 5 sequences that deals Cryo DMG. As the controlled operator, Final Strike also deals 15 Stagger. DIVE ATTACK: Basic attack performed in mid-air becomes a dive attack that deals Cryo DMG to nearby enemies. FINISHER: Basic attack performed near a Staggered enemy becomes a finisher attack that deals massive Cryo DMG and recovers some SP.

Distributed DoS.description: Summons an Auxiliary Crystal that orbits the operator for a while. When the controlled operator performs a Final Strike on the enemy, the Auxiliary Crystal restores the said operator's HP. This effect can trigger 2 times. The attribute of Will increases the amount of HP treatment. When the controlled operator is already at Max HP when triggering the HP restoration, grant the said operator a temporary Arts Amp instead. This effect cannot stack.

Stress Testing.description: Quickly charges up the Auxiliary Crystal and launches it at the enemy to deal Cryo DMG and Cryo Infliction. Trigger: When the Auxiliary Crystal uses up its HP treatments.

Stack Overflow.description: Applies temporary Cryo Amp and Nature Amp to the entire team. The attribute of Intellect increases the Amp effect.

talents.name: Standardized Scripting
talents.description: Assign to Manufacturing Cabin to grant operator EXP material production efficiency +10/20%.

talents.name: Murmuring Session
talents.description: Assign to Reception Room to grant operators a small Clue 5/Clue 5 Rate-UP: Cabal of Tranquility (activates upon assignment; effects of the same type cannot stack)

talents.name: Execute Process
talents.description: Combo skill Stress Testing improved: Hitting an enemy with Cryo Infliction or Solidification also causes the enemy to take Cryo DMG Dealt +7/10% for 5s. This effect cannot stack.

talents.name: Freeze Protocol
talents.description: Ultimate Stack Overflow improved: The ultimate also dispels Cryo Infliction and Solidification from the entire team.

Exuberant Trigger.description: BASIC ATTACK: An attack with up to 5 sequences that deals Cryo DMG. As the controlled operator, Final Strike also deals 17 Stagger. DIVE ATTACK: Basic attack performed in mid-air becomes a dive attack that deals Cryo DMG to nearby enemies. FINISHER: Basic attack performed near a Staggered enemy becomes a finisher attack that deals massive Cryo DMG and recovers some SP.

Brr-Brr-Bomb β.description: Throws a freezing bomb. The bomb explodes when it hits the enemy to deal Cryo DMG. If hitting an enemy with Cryo Infliction or Nature Infliction, then consume all Arts Infliction stacks, forcibly apply Solidification, and deal Cryo DMG to the target based on the number of stacks consumed. After the battle skill successfully applies Solidification, Yvonne gains additional Ultimate Energy based on the number of stacks consumed. This Ultimate Energy Gain effect can only trigger 1 time, even if the skill hits multiple enemies.

Flashfreezer υ37.description: Immediately deploys Frost-e-Bytee next to the enemy. While active, Frost-e-Bytee constantly releases energy to attack nearby enemies, deals Cryo DMG to them, and pulls them towards itself. After Frost-e-Bytee expires, it explodes to forcibly apply Solidification and deal Cryo DMG to nearby enemies. After the combo skill successfully hits the enemy, Yvonne gains additional Ultimate Energy. This Ultimate Energy Gain effect can only trigger 1 time, even if the skill hits multiple enemies. Trigger: When the controlled operator performs a Final Strike on an enemy with Solidification.

Cryoblasting Pistolier.description: Immediately deploys the support bot Tink-a-Bella and makes Yvonne the controlled operator. Temporarily enhances Yvonne's basic attack (BATK). Each BATK sequence performed grants a stack of Critical Rate buff. After reaching max stacks, Yvonne also gains a Critical DMG buff. When the skill is about to end, Yvonne's last BATK becomes a Final Strike that deals massive Cryo DMG. If the enemy is Solidified, Yvonne performs an additional attack that deals Cryo DMG and then consumes the enemy's Solidification.

talents.name: Fungal Pigment Extraction
talents.description: Assign to Growth Chamber to grant fungal matter growth rate +20/30%.

talents.name: Fashionista
talents.description: Assign to Growth Chamber to slow Mood Drop of all operators in it by 14/18%.

talents.name: Barrage of Technology
talents.description: Battle skill Brr-Brr-Bomb ß improved: After applying Solidification, the next basic attack performed becomes a Final Strike. At level 2, the Final Strike has a buff of DMG Dealt +50%.

talents.name: Freezing Point
talents.description: Against enemies with active Cryo Infliction, gains Critical DMG Dealt +10/20%. Effect is doubled against enemies with Solidification.
